payload.idea:
Create a follow-up ticket related to tkt_01krf9fc4rxb5qx31pe8jgwf3j (Reduce density and improve View Ticket dialog hierarchy).

Follow-up request:
I would like a few small updates:

1. the title of the ticket card is in a box, ideally I would just like the tital at the top left of the header, this means moving the tags and "Title" form label so that the title looks like a typical window title, double clicking the title can make it inline editable
2. Lets move the Status, Priority, Effory and lables form componets the top top of the right sidebar as Ticket Details.

result.title: Refine ticket detail header title and sidebar metadata layout
